title: neurolepis
intro: Neurolepis is a genus of flowering plants in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. This plant is primarily found in the tropical regions of Central and South America and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Neurolepis include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve digestive issues, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Neurolepis can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or used topically to leverage its medicinal properties.
